creator: _jkrow
caption:
“What’s it like to visit Antarctica?”
Is definitely the hardest question to answer. 

It’s hard to explain the sense of awe, the stillness, the scale of it, and how weirdly disorienting it is (in the best way) because your brain can’t immediately process the fact that this place exists on the same planet.

So here are some clips to show you instead ❄️🐧 let me know what you think!

📍 Antarctica with @lindbladexp
